titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Regional Science Association International records, 1964-2017.
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

titlepage.titleproper: Guide to the Regional Science Association International Records, 1964-2017.
titlepage.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections Cornell University Library

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

titlepage.date: © 2010 Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Correspondence, conference meeting files, papers delivered, annual meeting records, subject files.

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: Formerly the Regional Science Association. Academic and professional individuals concerned with practice and advancement of urban and regional analysis and related studies.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, conference meeting files, papers delivered, annual meeting records, subject files pertaining to North American meetings, Summer Institute and workshop files, Council minutes, RSA Newsletters, proposals, research and editorial files, audiotapes, publications, and other records of the organization; includes personal correspondence and working files of David E. Boyce, conference coordinator and program chair of North American meetings.
Includes material related to organizing the 1976 North American Annual Meeting of the Regional Science Association

did.unittitle: Minutes of Meetings, Various Admin. Files and RSA Newsletter
Applications to National Science Foundation and Proposal for Walter Isard's Honorary Degree
Manographs, Journal Paper and Graduate Course Detail
NSF Proposals and Files Relating to Publication
Regional Science Research Institute Discussion Paper Series
Regional Science Research Institute Discussion Paper Series

scopecontent.p: Includes H. Kohno's manuscript for History of Japan section and David Boyce's personal files

did.unittitle: XXXVIIeme colloque de l'ASRDLF - La Science Regionale au Tournant du Siecle

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: Association de Science Regionale de Langue Francaise

did.unittitle: RSAI Membership Database and Program - DBF format
54th Annual North American Meeting, Savannah - Abstracts, authors, program
6th World Congress of the RSAI, Lugano
ERSA 2002 - From Industry to Advanced Services - Perspectives of European Metropolitan Regions - Congress CD-ROM
43rd Congress of the European Regional Science Association
NARSC, conference proceedings, W. Beyer's notebook

scopecontent.p: Includes W. Beyer's 1964 notebook from the Berkeley Regional Science Workshop, documents related to the NARSC constitution, and conference proceedings from Korea, Japan, Germany, and the US.

processinfo.p: Folder 7 contains materials relating to the closure of the RS department at UPEnn circa 1993 that were collected by a student. Newspapers were removed and are housed in box 20.

scopecontent.p: Issues of The Daily Pennsylvanian documenting the closure of the RS department at Upenn.

list.head: Books - cataloged individually in the Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
list.item: Regional Studies in Poland: Experiences and Prospects /[edited by Antoni Kuklinski]. - [Poland] : Polish Academy of Sciences Committee for Space Economy and Regional Planning, 1986.

Changes in the Regional Economy in the Period of System Transformation /[edited by Ryszard Domanski and Eamonn Judge]. - [Poland] : Polish Academy of Sciences Committee for Space Economy and Regional Planning, 1994.

Towards the Explanation and Modelling of the Spatial and Regional Dimensions of the Transformation Process /[edited by Ryszard Domanski]. - [Poland] : Polish Academy of Sciences Committee for Space Economy and Regional Planning, 1996.
The Spatial Transformation of the Economy /[edited by Ryszard Domanski]. - [Poland] : Polish Academy of Sciences Committee for Space Economy and Regional Planning, 1998.
Emerging Spatial and Regional Structures of an Economy in Transition /[edited by Ryszard Domanski]. - [Poland] : Polish Academy of Sciences Committee for Space Economy and Regional Planning, 1998.
The Competitiveness of Regions in the Polish and European Perspective /[edited by Ryszard Domanski]. - [Poland] : Polish Academy of Sciences Committee for Space Economy and Regional Planning, 1999.
Cities and Regions in an Englarging European Union /[edited by Ryszard Domanski]. - [Poland] : Polish Academy of Sciences Committee for Space Economy and Regional Planning, 2002.

Polycentric Metropolitan Regions - New Concepts and Experiences /[edited by Tadeusz Markowski and Tadeusz Marszal]. - [Poland] : Polish Academy of Sciences Committee for Space Economy and Regional Planning, 2002.
Recent Developments in Regional Science /[edited by Rolf Funck].1972.
Studies in Regional Science /[edited by Allen J. Scott].1969.
Urban and Regional Planning /[edited by A.G. Wilson].1971.
Regional Development and Planning: International Perspectives /[edited by Antoni Kuklinski].1975.
Space-Structure-Economy: A Tribute to August Losch /[edited by Rolf Funck and Antoni Kuklinski].1986.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Regional Science Association International records, #4991. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
